texto: I'm now more about romantic beauty. The dominatrix thing is over. You never look as good in person as you do in 'Maxim,' but it's fun. It's all like a fantasy.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Julianna Guill: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I'm now more about romantic beauty. The dominatrix thing is over. You never look as good in perso…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, romantic, good pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de good e fun.

texto: One of my favorite things about working on 'Glory Daze' is getting to wear amazing '80s outfits coupled with fabulously over-the-top hair and makeup. My wardrobe usually consists of colorful sweaters, denim skirts, high-waisted shorts, crop tops, dangly earrings, jean jackets, and, of course, panty hose and shoulder pads.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Julianna Guill sobre temas ligados a trabalho. A afirmação “One of my favorite things about working on 'Glory Daze' is getting to wear amazing '80s outfits c…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a trabalho, hair, makeup, útil em momentos de trabalho e makeup.
